properties.body: NAVAREA XX 30/26 BARENTS SEA. CHART RUS 10100. 1. ARTILLERY FIRINGS 0500 TO 1700 UTC DAILY 13 TO 16 MAR NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 69-58.0N 033-38.0E, 69-58.0N 034-48.0E, 69-35.0N 034-48.0E, 69-35.0N 033-38.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 161800 UTC MAR 26.= NNNN
